name: onx-integration-kit
description: End-to-end testing and reference implementation for onX (Order Network Exchange) with ACP and UCP

scripts.dev: concurrently -n onx,acp,ucp,ful -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "pnpm --filter @onx-kit/onx-hub dev" "pnpm --filter @onx-kit/mock-acp dev" "pnpm --filter @onx-kit/mock-ucp dev" "pnpm --filter @onx-kit/mock-fulfillment dev"
